CONTENT.Club career: Campbell made his professional debut for Wolverhampton Wanderers, on 30 October 2019 in a 2–1 defeat against Aston Villa in the EFL Cup.Campbell made his Premier League debut as a second-half substitute in 1–0 loss away to Newcastle United on 8 April 2022.On 30 January 2023, Campbell joined League One club Wycombe Wanderers on loan until the end of the 2022-23 season.On 23 August 2023, Campbell joined Charlton Athletic on a season long loan.On 15 January 2024, it was confirmed that Campbell had returned to Wolverhampton Wanderers.On 16 January 2024, Campbell re-joined League One club Wycombe Wanderers on loan until the end of the 2023-24 season.
CONTENT.International career: Born in England, Campbell is of Jamaican and Welsh descent. He played for the Wales U17s in 2018.

SUMMARY: Chem Campbell (born 30 December 2002) is a Welsh footballer who plays as a winger for Premier League club Wolverhampton Wanderers. He is a former youth international for Wales.
